title.en: China-to-Liberia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入利比里亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入賴比瑞亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Liberia NSL/LiSA conformity context, LERC licensing and technical regulation, LEC grid-connection review, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding at 60 Hz, IEC 61727 grid-interface expectations, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, humid tropical operating conditions, and donor or lender off-grid requirements — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与利比里亚NSL/LiSA合格评定背景、LERC许可和技术监管、LEC并网审查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、60 Hz下IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口要求、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC证据、潮湿热带运行条件以及捐助方或贷款方离网要求——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與賴比瑞亞NSL/LiSA合格評定背景、LERC許可和技術監管、LEC併網審查、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、60 Hz下IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面要求、IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC證據、潮濕熱帶運行條件以及捐助方或貸款方離網要求——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NSL or Liberia Standards Authority conformity determination, LERC licence or permit decision, LEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, donor procurement clearance, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Liberia standards-authority naming and scope, LERC licensing and technical regulations, LEC connection requirements, project-owner specifications, humidity and corrosion assumptions, and applicable IEC or donor requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NSL或利比里亚标准局合格评定裁定、LERC许可或准证决定、LEC并网批准、海关裁定、捐助方采购放行或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行利比里亚标准机构名称和职责范围、LERC许可及技术法规、LEC接入要求、项目业主规格、湿热和腐蚀条件假设以及适用IEC或捐助方要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NSL或賴比瑞亞標準局合格評定裁定、LERC許可或准證決定、LEC併網批准、海關裁定、捐助方採購放行或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行賴比瑞亞標準機構名稱和職責範圍、LERC許可及技術法規、LEC接入要求、項目業主規格、濕熱和腐蝕條件假設以及適用IEC或捐助方要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Liberia, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming the current conformity-assessment gate with Liberia's standards authority, noting that recent official MOCI pages refer to the Liberia Standards Authority (LiSA) rather than only NSL; (2) LERC licensing or permit review for generation, distribution, micro-utility, and electrical-professional activities where applicable; (3) LEC or local utility connection approval for grid-tied systems; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface, and IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) reconfiguring and retesting Chinese inverter protection settings for Liberia's commonly reported 120/240 V, 60 Hz supply environment, rather than China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful background but should not be treated as automatically accepted in Liberia, especially for 60 Hz anti-islanding and humid tropical operation.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口利比里亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认利比里亚标准机构的现行合格评定门槛，并注意近期MOCI官方网页使用Liberia Standards Authority（LiSA）而不只是NSL；（2）在适用时完成发电、配电、微型公用事业及电气专业人员活动的LERC许可或准证审查；（3）并网系统取得LEC或当地公用事业接入批准；（4）准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口及IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）将中国逆变器保护整定重新配置并重新测试为利比里亚通常报告的120/240 V、60 Hz供电环境，而不是中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景资料，但不应视为在利比里亚自动接受，尤其是60 Hz防孤岛和湿热运行方面。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口賴比瑞亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認賴比瑞亞標準機構的現行合格評定門檻，並注意近期MOCI官方網頁使用Liberia Standards Authority（LiSA）而不只是NSL；（2）在適用時完成發電、配電、微型公用事業及電氣專業人員活動的LERC許可或准證審查；（3）併網系統取得LEC或當地公用事業接入批准；（4）準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面及IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）將中國逆變器保護整定重新配置並重新測試為賴比瑞亞通常報告的120/240 V、60 Hz供電環境，而不是中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景資料，但不應視為在賴比瑞亞自動接受，尤其是60 Hz防孤島和濕熱運行方面。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
